S if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    warmup_steps = max(1, min(total_steps // 10, WARMUP_EPOCHS * steps_per_epoch))\\n    decay_steps = max(1, total_steps - warmup_steps)\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(step: int) -> float:\\n        if step < warmup_steps:\\n            return float(step + 1) / float(warmup_steps)\\n        progress = min(1.0, float(step - warmup_steps) / float(decay_steps))\\n        return 0.5 * (1.0 + float(np.cos(np.pi * progress)))\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed 256-step budget more effectively: switch to AdamW, enable a budget-aware cosine warmup schedule, and modestly increase CNN capacity so optimization has enough signal under the short run.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"layout\"]}"}}
